title: Squirrel Work Packet
description: Bounded unit of work dispatched to an execution lane. Produced by decomposition of a task.

packet_id.description: Unique packet identifier. Format: wp_YYYY_NNNN_SS (SS = step number)

task_id.description: Parent task this packet belongs to.

step.description: Execution order within the parent task decomposition.

role.description: Sub-agent role assigned to this packet. Determines allowed work.

objective.description: Single bounded action for this packet.

lane_hint.description: Preferred lane for dispatch. Commander may override.

inputs.description: Input artifacts or data this packet consumes.

context_files.description: Files this packet needs. Subset of parent task context.

constraints.description: Packet-level constraints inherited or narrowed from parent task.

depends_on.description: Packet IDs that must complete before this packet can run.

priority.description: Packet priority, inherited from parent task.
